title: CreateUserRequest
description: Request body for creating or updating a user in FullStory

uid.description: External user identifier. Omit to create an anonymous user.

display_name.description: The display name for the user

email.description: The email address for the user

properties.description: Custom key-value properties to attach to the user. Type suffixes are not required in v2 as types are inferred automatically.

schema.description: Optional explicit type declarations for custom properties to override the default type inference
